allow: Bash(node -e "const s = require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('C:/Users/r.rose/.claude/settings.json','utf8'\); const j = JSON.parse\(s\); const mcp = j.mcpServers; if\(mcp\) { Object.entries\(mcp\).forEach\(\([k,v]\) => { console.log\(k, JSON.stringify\({url:v.url, type:v.type, headers: v.headers ? Object.keys\(v.headers\) : undefined}\)\); }\); }")

PowerShell($proc = Get-Process -Id 23088 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if\($proc\) { $proc | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, @{N='Path';E={$_.MainModule.FileName}}; $wmi = Get-WmiObject Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=23088"; $wmi.CommandLine })

PowerShell($proc = Get-WmiObject Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=23088"; Write-Output "CommandLine: $\($proc.CommandLine\)"; $parentId = $proc.ParentProcessId; Write-Output "Parent PID: $parentId"; $parent = Get-WmiObject Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=$parentId"; Write-Output "Parent: $\($parent.Name\) - $\($parent.CommandLine\)")
